titles.title: Hitozuma no Kuchibiru wa Kan Chuuhai no Aji ga Shite
人妻の唇は缶チューハイの味がして
Chuhai Lips: Canned Flavor of Married Women

data.title: Hitozuma no Kuchibiru wa Kan Chuuhai no Aji ga Shite
data.title_english: Chuhai Lips: Canned Flavor of Married Women
data.title_japanese: 人妻の唇は缶チューハイの味がして
data.synopsis:
When college student Tsuyoshi returns to his apartment from a convenience store, he is surprised to see Yui Kooriyama at his doorstep. Sent by his mother to check up on him, Yui forces herself inside his personal living space. Despite Yui already being married, the seemingly normal visit takes a sudden turn when they get drunk and spend a night together. As he is invited for more drinks by other married women, Tsuyoshi finds himself sharing all kinds of intimate moments with them.

[Written by MAL Rewrite]
data.background: Hitozuma no Kuchibiru wa Kan Chuuhai no Aji ga Shite was released on Blu-ray and DVD on November 26, 2025.

titles.title: Ansatsusha de Aru Ore no Status ga Yuusha yori mo Akiraka ni Tsuyoi no da ga
暗殺者である俺のステータスが勇者よりも明らかに強いのだが
My Status as an Assassin Obviously Exceeds the Hero's

data.title: Ansatsusha de Aru Ore no Status ga Yuusha yori mo Akiraka ni Tsuyoi no da ga
data.title_english: My Status as an Assassin Obviously Exceeds the Hero's
data.title_japanese: 暗殺者である俺のステータスが勇者よりも明らかに強いのだが
data.synopsis:
Oda Akira is the kind of guy who people forget is even there. His unassuming nature pays off, though, when his entire class is swept away to a fantasy world, and he slips easily into his new role as a silent assassin. Between his suspiciously high starting stats and too many details that don't fit, Akira is sure something is wrong. But digging into royal secrets is a dangerous game, and when Akira uncovers an evil scheme, he also makes a powerful enemy—the very king who brought him to this world! With the help of the elven spirit medium Amelia, can he find the power to set things right, and get his revenge?

(Source: Seven Seas Entertainment)

titles.title: Arifureta Shokugyou de Sekai Saikyou 3rd Season Picture Drama
ありふれた職業で世界最強 ピクチャードラマ
Arifureta: From Commonplace to World's Strongest Season 3 Picture Drama

data.title: Arifureta Shokugyou de Sekai Saikyou 3rd Season Picture Drama
data.title_english: Arifureta: From Commonplace to World's Strongest Season 3 Picture Drama
data.title_japanese: ありふれた職業で世界最強 ピクチャードラマ
data.synopsis:
An online motion graphic spin-off series that provides a comedic interpretation of events that have occurred in conjunction with the Anime. These episodes were originally posted on the official Twitter page on a weekly basis that coincided with the debut of each of the anime's episodes, and were later included in the Blu-ray BOX sets. The voice cast for the Picture Dramas is the same as the Anime cast.

(Source: Arifureta Wiki)

titles.title: Kininatteru Hito ga Otoko ja Nakatta
The Guy She Was Interested in Wasn't a Guy at All
気になってる人が男じゃなかった

data.title: Kininatteru Hito ga Otoko ja Nakatta
data.title_japanese: 気になってる人が男じゃなかった
title_synonyms: The Guy She Was Interested in Wasn't a Guy at All
data.synopsis:
The black-clad boy that Aya Oosawa likes is perfect: he is effortlessly nonchalant, has a sharp sense of style, and listens to the best music. Ever since the trendy Aya stumbled upon a small CD store to enjoy the rock classics her friends are not familiar with, the mysterious employee behind the counter has been on her mind. Meanwhile, the quiet and aloof Mitsuki Koga listens to her popular classmate Aya rave about her crush, tormented by a nagging thought: how to tell Aya that the guy she is interested in is not a guy at all!

In reality, when Mitsuki sheds her plain high school uniform, she is the one manning the counter at her uncle Joe's CD shop. She wrestles with how to reveal her identity, but flirting with the stunning and clueless Aya is just too tempting. As music becomes their shared passion, it seems that Aya's feelings will remain unchanged—even when Mitsuki's secret comes to light.

[Written by MAL Rewrite]

data.title: Trust (Movie)
data.synopsis:
In the near future, as technology takes another leap forward, humanity becomes increasingly immersed in the metaverse. However, with this digital evolution comes a surge in cybercrime. To counter it more effectively, metaverse operators have begun equipping AI with advanced investigative capabilities.

Violet, an artificial intelligence designed for interrogations, is assigned a new task: to question a young woman named Mia.
